# 4viso

> 4viso is a Belgium-based company building supply-chain technology that connects manufacturers, logistics providers, and downstream partners. This site is the public marketing presence for the company, its product, news, and team.

Replace this paragraph with the official one-sentence pitch before publishing.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://4viso.com/): Company overview and waiting-list signup.
- [News](https://4viso.com/news): Product updates, company announcements, industry commentary.

## Company

- Legal name: 4viso
- Address: Science Park Antwerp, Galileilaan 15, 2845 Niel, Belgium
- LinkedIn: replace-with-linkedin-url
